session_summary:
## Lane 1: Visual Agent Intelligence DAG — Complete

Built the foundation for a visual, interactive "decision tree" showing agent activity in real-time. No competitor (Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf) has this.

### Files Created (2)
- `packages/app/src/pages/session/timeline-scrubber.tsx` (138 lines) — Visual scrubber bar with turn segments, position indicator, draggable scrub handle, hover tooltips
- `packages/app/src/pages/session/timeline-scrubber.css` — Scrubber styling

### Files Modified (4)
- `packages/app/src/pages/session/message-timeline.data.ts` — Added `Checkpoint` tagged class to `TimelineRow` namespace, `Checkpoint` to `TimelineRowMap`, key generation, and union type
- `packages/app/src/pages/session/message-timeline.tsx` (1,676 lines) — Added: fork ↷ button on TurnDivider (hover reveal), agent color left border on AssistantPart rows, Checkpoint diamond icon rendering, scrubberTurns memo + TimelineScrubber component integration
- `packages/app/src/context/session-viz.tsx` (660 lines) — Added: `AgentHeartbeatInfo` type, `agentHeartbeat` field on sessions, heartbeat tracking in step/tool/success/failed handlers, `getAgentColor` helper, `agentColorMap` for deterministic agent colors
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/activity-feed.tsx` (193 lines) — Added: current agent heartbeat badge with pulsing indicator, AGENT_COLORS mapping, color-coded agent name badges with dots, CSS animation keyframes
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/viz-panel.tsx` (105 lines) — Added: mini turn indicator showing colored dots for recent session activity

### Verification
- `bun tsgo -b` (typecheck): Zero new errors (all 25 pre-existing)
- `bun test:unit`: 318/326 pass, 0 new failures (8 pre-existing module resolution failures)
- All 9 existing TimelineRow types render correctly
- No breaking changes to existing timeline behavior
next_steps:
1. Wire the fork button on TurnDivider to actually trigger a proper session fork (currently opens DialogFork but could benefit from passing the specific messageID context)
2. Add right-click context menu on checkpoints for labeling/removal
3. Make the scrubber position indicator match the actual current turn index (currently hardcoded to 0)
4. Add keyboard shortcuts for scrubber navigation (←/→ to jump between turns)
5. Add real-time animated thinking shimmer on active agent rows

findings.summary: TimelineScrubber component created with turn segments, drag handle, hover tooltip, position indicator
message-timeline evolved with Fork button on TurnDivider, agent colored left border on AssistantPart, Checkpoint row rendering, scrubber integration
message-timeline.data.ts extended with Checkpoint tagged class in TimelineRow namespace
session-viz context extended with AgentHeartbeatInfo type, heartbeat tracking in step/tool handlers, getAgentColor helper
ActivityFeed enhanced with agent heartbeat badge, AGENT_COLORS mapping, agent switching animation, color-coded agent badges
VizPanel enhanced with mini turn indicator showing colored dots for recent session turns
